name: ORDERS
description: Per-bot order flow: orders.requests.<bot_id> (strategy → execution) and orders.events.<bot_id> (execution → all listeners). max_age 30d; duplicate_window 30s is a fast-fail guard for publish retries, kept tight because market orders are @non_idempotent per H-003 and callers must never retry on timeout. Brief §8.1, §8.2.
